requirement_topic.en: EMC — Radio Frequency Emissions and Interference Management (NRTC / MICT Frequency Regulation)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容 — 无线电频率辐射及干扰管理（NRTC / MICT频率监管）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容 — 無線電頻率輻射及干擾管理（NRTC / MICT頻率監管）

summary.en: Radio frequency (RF) emissions from wireless and IoT devices in Laos are regulated by MICT (Ministry of Technology and Communications) and the NRTC (National Radio and Television Committee) under the Lao national radio frequency management framework. Wireless devices must operate within the permitted frequency bands and transmission power limits specified in the Lao National Radio Frequency Allocation Table. Devices that cause harmful interference to authorised radio services or public broadcasting infrastructure overseen by NRTC are prohibited. EMC emissions limits applicable to wireless/IoT equipment in Laos are expected to align broadly with CISPR-based international limits, but mandatory adoption of specific CISPR or IEC EMC standards is to be verified with MICT/DOSM. The 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz Wi-Fi bands are regulated under MICT frequency management; Laos partially adopts ASEAN harmonised Wi-Fi bands but specific permitted power levels and channel plans for the 5 GHz U-NII range must be confirmed against the current Lao frequency allocation. Devices found to cause interference may be recalled or prohibited from sale by MICT.
summary.zh: 老挝无线及物联网设备的无线电频率（RF）辐射由MICT（科技通信部）和NRTC（国家广播电视委员会）依据老挝国家无线电频率管理框架进行监管。无线设备须在老挝国家无线电频率分配表规定的允许频段和发射功率限值范围内运行。禁止对NRTC监管的授权无线电业务或公共广播基础设施造成有害干扰的设备。适用于老挝无线/物联网设备的电磁兼容辐射限值预计与CISPR国际限值大致相符，但特定CISPR或IEC电磁兼容标准的强制采用须向MICT/DOSM核实。2.4 GHz和5 GHz Wi-Fi频段受MICT频率管理约束；老挝部分采用东盟协调Wi-Fi频段，但5 GHz U-NII频段的具体允许功率电平和信道方案须与当前老挝频率分配表进行确认。被认定造成干扰的设备可能被MICT召回或禁止销售。
summary.zht: 寮國無線及物聯網設備的無線電頻率（RF）輻射由MICT（科技通訊部）和NRTC（國家廣播電視委員會）依據寮國國家無線電頻率管理框架進行監管。無線設備須在寮國國家無線電頻率分配表規定的允許頻段和發射功率限值範圍內運行。禁止對NRTC監管的授權無線電業務或公共廣播基礎設施造成有害干擾的設備。適用於寮國無線/物聯網設備的電磁相容輻射限值預計與CISPR國際限值大致相符，但特定CISPR或IEC電磁相容標準的強制採用須向MICT/DOSM核實。2.4 GHz和5 GHz Wi-Fi頻段受MICT頻率管理約束；寮國部分採用東盟協調Wi-Fi頻段，但5 GHz U-NII頻段的具體允許功率電平和信道方案須與當前寮國頻率分配表進行確認。被認定造成干擾的設備可能被MICT召回或禁止銷售。

standards_or_laws: Lao National Radio Frequency Allocation Table — administered by MICT; defines permitted frequency bands and power limits for wireless devices
Lao PDR Telecommunications Law (2011 and amendments) — harmful interference prohibition; MICT enforcement authority
NRTC (National Radio and Television Committee) — oversight of radio frequency spectrum coordination and broadcast interference protection
ASEAN Digital Masterplan 2025 — ASEAN frequency harmonisation framework applicable to 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz Wi-Fi bands (Laos partial adoption)
CISPR 32 / IEC CISPR series — international EMC emissions limits (reference for MICT/DOSM technical standards alignment; mandatory adoption to be verified)

summary.en: In China, EMC emissions for wireless and IT equipment are governed by mandatory GB standards enforced through the SRRC type approval and CCC certification processes. Key standards include GB/T 9254 (Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics, aligned with CISPR 22/32) for emissions and GB/T 17618 (aligned with CISPR 24/35) for immunity. SRRC type approval includes assessment of RF emissions against Chinese frequency allocation limits. The MIIT network access license (NAL) process also incorporates EMC and radio performance requirements. Test laboratories must be CNAS-accredited. China's national frequency allocations for 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz Wi-Fi follow ITU Radio Regulations with national adjustments.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线和IT设备的电磁兼容辐射通过SRRC型号核准和CCC认证流程强制执行GB标准进行管控。主要标准包括GB/T 9254（信息技术设备无线电干扰特性，与CISPR 22/32接轨）（辐射）和GB/T 17618（与CISPR 24/35接轨）（抗扰度）。SRRC型号核准包含依据中国频率分配限值对RF辐射的评估。工业和信息化部网络接入许可（NAL）流程亦涵盖电磁兼容和无线电性能要求。检测实验室须经CNAS认可。中国2.4 GHz和5 GHz Wi-Fi国家频率分配遵循ITU无线电规则并作国家调整。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線和IT設備的電磁相容輻射通過SRRC型號核准和CCC認證流程強制執行GB標準進行管控。主要標準包括GB/T 9254（信息技術設備無線電干擾特性，與CISPR 22/32接軌）（輻射）和GB/T 17618（與CISPR 24/35接軌）（抗擾度）。SRRC型號核准包含依據中國頻率分配限值對RF輻射的評估。工業和信息化部網路接入許可（NAL）流程亦涵蓋電磁相容和無線電性能要求。檢測實驗室須經CNAS認可。中國2.4 GHz和5 GHz Wi-Fi國家頻率分配遵循ITU無線電規則並作國家調整。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment; radio disturbance characteristics; limits and methods of measurement (aligned with CISPR 22/32) (SAMR/MIIT, mandatory via CCC/SRRC)
GB/T 17618 — Information technology equipment; immunity characteristics; limits and methods of measurement (aligned with CISPR 24/35) (SAMR/MIIT)
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation Commission; includes RF emissions assessment against Chinese national frequency allocation limits
MIIT network access license (NAL) — incorporates EMC and radio performance requirements for telecom terminals

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 9254 and SRRC/NAL EMC approvals are not recognised by Lao MICT or NRTC. The Lao national frequency allocation may specify different permitted power levels and channel plans compared with Chinese SRRC approvals — in particular, the 5 GHz U-NII sub-band plan (U-NII-1, U-NII-2A, U-NII-2C/DFS, U-NII-3) and DFS (Dynamic Frequency Selection) requirements may differ or may not be harmonised with Chinese settings. Manufacturers must verify their device's operating frequencies, channel plans, and transmission power levels against the current Lao National Radio Frequency Allocation Table administered by MICT before seeking MICT type approval. Whether DOSM has published specific mandatory Lao EMC emissions standards equivalent to CISPR 32 is to be confirmed with MICT/DOSM; in the absence of Lao-specific EMC standards, alignment with relevant ITU/CISPR limits as a baseline is recommended. NRTC interference protection requirements for broadcasting bands (FM, DAB, TV) must be observed.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 9254及SRRC/NAL电磁兼容核准不被老挝MICT或NRTC认可。老挝国家频率分配对允许功率电平和信道方案的规定可能与中国SRRC核准存在差异——尤其是5 GHz U-NII子频段方案（U-NII-1、U-NII-2A、U-NII-2C/DFS、U-NII-3）以及动态频率选择（DFS）要求，可能与中国设定存在差异或尚未协调。制造商在申请MICT型号批准前，须对照MICT管理的最新老挝国家无线电频率分配表，核实设备的工作频率、信道方案和发射功率电平。DOSM是否已发布等同于CISPR 32的特定老挝强制电磁兼容辐射标准，须向MICT/DOSM确认；在缺乏老挝特有电磁兼容标准的情况下，建议以ITU/CISPR相关限值为基准。须遵守NRTC对广播频段（FM、DAB、电视）的干扰保护要求。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 9254及SRRC/NAL電磁相容核准不被寮國MICT或NRTC認可。寮國國家頻率分配對允許功率電平和信道方案的規定可能與中國SRRC核准存在差異——尤其是5 GHz U-NII子頻段方案（U-NII-1、U-NII-2A、U-NII-2C/DFS、U-NII-3）以及動態頻率選擇（DFS）要求，可能與中國設定存在差異或尚未協調。製造商在申請MICT型號批准前，須對照MICT管理的最新寮國國家無線電頻率分配表，核實設備的工作頻率、信道方案和發射功率電平。DOSM是否已發布等同於CISPR 32的特定寮國強制電磁相容輻射標準，須向MICT/DOSM確認；在缺乏寮國特有電磁相容標準的情況下，建議以ITU/CISPR相關限值為基準。須遵守NRTC對廣播頻段（FM、DAB、電視）的干擾保護要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — devices must operate within Lao MICT frequency allocation limits and must not cause harmful interference to NRTC-regulated services; MICT type approval process evaluates frequency and emissions compliance; specific Lao mandatory EMC emissions standard equivalent to CISPR 32 is to be confirmed with MICT/DOSM
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 9254 emissions limits mandatory via CCC/SRRC type approval for wireless and IT equipment sold in China; SRRC type approval evaluates RF output against Chinese national frequency allocation

source.publisher: Ministry of Technology and Communications (MICT) and National Radio and Television Committee (NRTC), Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Wireless devices entering Laos must comply with MICT-administered frequency allocations and must not cause harmful interference to NRTC-regulated broadcasting and radio services. Chinese SRRC and GB/T 9254 EMC approvals are not recognised. The 5 GHz Wi-Fi band channel plan and permitted power levels must be verified against the current Lao National Radio Frequency Allocation Table — sub-band permissions and DFS requirements may differ from Chinese settings. Whether a specific Lao mandatory EMC emissions standard (CISPR 32 equivalent) has been published by DOSM should be confirmed before type approval application. Verified: false — confirm current MICT/NRTC frequency rules and DOSM EMC standards before relying on this row.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入老挝的无线设备须符合MICT管理的频率分配，且不得对NRTC监管的广播和无线电业务造成有害干扰。中国SRRC和GB/T 9254电磁兼容核准不被认可。5 GHz Wi-Fi频段信道方案和允许功率电平须对照最新老挝国家无线电频率分配表核实——子频段许可和DFS要求可能与中国设定存在差异。DOSM是否已发布特定老挝强制电磁兼容辐射标准（CISPR 32等效标准）应在申请型号批准前确认。已核实：否——在依赖本行内容前，请确认MICT/NRTC当前频率规则和DOSM电磁兼容标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入寮國的無線設備須符合MICT管理的頻率分配，且不得對NRTC監管的廣播和無線電業務造成有害干擾。中國SRRC和GB/T 9254電磁相容核准不被認可。5 GHz Wi-Fi頻段信道方案和允許功率電平須對照最新寮國國家無線電頻率分配表核實——子頻段許可和DFS要求可能與中國設定存在差異。DOSM是否已發布特定寮國強制電磁相容輻射標準（CISPR 32等效標準）應在申請型號批准前確認。已核實：否——在依賴本行內容前，請確認MICT/NRTC當前頻率規則和DOSM電磁相容標準。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Immunity and Electromagnetic Compatibility of Wireless / IoT Devices (DOSM / MICT Technical Standards)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容 — 无线/物联网设备的抗扰度及电磁兼容性（DOSM / MICT技术标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容 — 無線/物聯網設備的抗擾度及電磁相容性（DOSM / MICT技術標準）

summary.en: Electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) immunity for wireless and IoT devices in Laos encompasses the device's ability to operate without degradation in the presence of electromagnetic disturbances from the 230 V / 50 Hz power grid, other radio equipment, and industrial sources. DOSM (Department of Standards and Metrology, under Ministry of Science and Technology) is the technical standards body responsible for adopting or referencing IEC/CISPR-based Lao national standards (MS standards) for EMC. MICT may reference DOSM MS standards within the MICT type approval process. As of mid-2026, whether DOSM has published mandatory Lao EMC immunity standards directly equivalent to CISPR 35 or IEC 61000-4 series for wireless/IoT devices should be confirmed with DOSM and MICT. In the absence of published mandatory Lao immunity standards, international best practice alignment with CISPR 35 and the IEC 61000-4 series (conducted immunity: ESD, EFT, surge, conducted RF, power frequency magnetic field) is recommended as a baseline for products targeting the Lao market.
summary.zh: 老挝无线及物联网设备的电磁兼容（EMC）抗扰度涵盖设备在230 V / 50 Hz电网、其他无线设备及工业来源电磁干扰环境下不降级运行的能力。DOSM（标准计量局，隶属科学技术部）是负责采用或参考基于IEC/CISPR的老挝国家标准（MS标准）的技术标准机构。MICT可在MICT型号批准流程中参引DOSM MS标准。截至2026年中，DOSM是否已发布直接等同于CISPR 35或IEC 61000-4系列（针对无线/物联网设备）的强制老挝电磁兼容抗扰度标准，须向DOSM和MICT确认。在尚无已发布的强制老挝抗扰度标准的情况下，建议以与CISPR 35和IEC 61000-4系列（传导抗扰度：静电放电、电快速瞬变脉冲群、浪涌、传导射频、工频磁场）的国际最佳实践对齐作为面向老挝市场产品的基准。
summary.zht: 寮國無線及物聯網設備的電磁相容（EMC）抗擾度涵蓋設備在230 V / 50 Hz電網、其他無線設備及工業來源電磁干擾環境下不降級運行的能力。DOSM（標準計量局，隸屬科學技術部）是負責採用或參考基於IEC/CISPR的寮國國家標準（MS標準）的技術標準機構。MICT可在MICT型號批准流程中參引DOSM MS標準。截至2026年中，DOSM是否已發布直接等同於CISPR 35或IEC 61000-4系列（針對無線/物聯網設備）的強制寮國電磁相容抗擾度標準，須向DOSM和MICT確認。在尚無已發布的強制寮國抗擾度標準的情況下，建議以與CISPR 35和IEC 61000-4系列（傳導抗擾度：靜電放電、電快速瞬變脈衝群、浪湧、傳導射頻、工頻磁場）的國際最佳實踐對齊作為面向寮國市場產品的基準。

standards_or_laws: Lao PDR DOSM MS standards (IEC/CISPR-based) — EMC immunity standards for information technology, audio/video, and communications equipment; mandatory status for wireless/IoT categories to be confirmed with DOSM
CISPR 35 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Immunity requirements (IEC/CISPR; reference for DOSM MS standard alignment)
IEC 61000-4 series — Electromagnetic compatibility; testing and measurement techniques; conducted and radiated immunity tests (IEC; reference for DOSM MS standard alignment)
MICT type approval procedures — may incorporate DOSM EMC technical standards references for wireless equipment evaluation

summary.en: In China, EMC immunity for information technology and multimedia equipment is assessed under GB/T 17618 (aligned with CISPR 24/35) and the GB/T 17626 series (aligned with IEC 61000-4 immunity test methods: ESD, EFT/burst, surge, conducted RF, power-frequency magnetic field, voltage dips). Compliance with these immunity standards is required as part of the CCC certification process for applicable IT equipment (CNCA-C17-01) and is also assessed under the SRRC/NAL type approval process. Test reports must be from CNAS-accredited EMC laboratories. China's 220 V / 50 Hz grid imposes slightly different surge and EFT test levels compared with the Lao 230 V / 50 Hz grid.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术及多媒体设备的电磁兼容抗扰度依据GB/T 17618（与CISPR 24/35接轨）和GB/T 17626系列（与IEC 61000-4抗扰度测试方法接轨：静电放电、电快速瞬变脉冲群/脉冲串、浪涌、传导射频、工频磁场、电压暂降）进行评估。符合这些抗扰度标准是适用IT设备CCC认证过程的要求（CNCA-C17-01），也是SRRC/NAL型号核准流程的评估内容。检测报告须来自CNAS认可的电磁兼容实验室。中国220 V / 50 Hz电网相比老挝230 V / 50 Hz电网，浪涌和电快速瞬变脉冲群测试电平略有差异。
summary.zht: 在中國，信息技術及多媒體設備的電磁相容抗擾度依據GB/T 17618（與CISPR 24/35接軌）和GB/T 17626系列（與IEC 61000-4抗擾度測試方法接軌：靜電放電、電快速瞬變脈衝群/脈衝串、浪湧、傳導射頻、工頻磁場、電壓暫降）進行評估。符合這些抗擾度標準是適用IT設備CCC認證過程的要求（CNCA-C17-01），也是SRRC/NAL型號核准流程的評估內容。檢測報告須來自CNAS認可的電磁相容實驗室。中國220 V / 50 Hz電網相比寮國230 V / 50 Hz電網，浪湧和電快速瞬變脈衝群測試電平略有差異。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17618 — Information technology equipment; immunity characteristics; limits and methods of measurement (aligned with CISPR 24/35) (SAMR/MIIT, mandatory via CCC for IT equipment)
GB/T 17626 series — Electromagnetic compatibility; testing and measurement techniques; immunity test methods (aligned with IEC 61000-4 series) (SAMR)

gap.en: Chinese CCC/GB/T 17618 EMC immunity test reports are not automatically recognised by Lao MICT or DOSM. The key immunity gap is: (1) grid voltage — Laos is 230 V vs. China 220 V, which may affect surge (IEC 61000-4-5) and EFT (IEC 61000-4-4) test voltage levels for mains-powered devices; equipment must be tested or assessed at 230 V test conditions for the Lao market; (2) mandatory Lao EMC immunity standard status — DOSM has not publicly confirmed publication of a mandatory MS standard equivalent to CISPR 35 or IEC 61000-4 series specifically for wireless/IoT devices; this must be verified with DOSM before type approval application; (3) test laboratory recognition — it is unknown whether Chinese CNAS-accredited EMC laboratory test reports are accepted by MICT/DOSM or whether tests conducted at Laos-recognised or ACCSQ-MRA-recognised laboratories are required. Manufacturers should seek pre-consultation with MICT/DOSM on acceptable test evidence for EMC immunity.
gap.zh: 中国CCC/GB/T 17618电磁兼容抗扰度检测报告不被老挝MICT或DOSM自动认可。主要抗扰度差距为：（1）电网电压——老挝为230 V，中国为220 V，这可能影响市电供电设备的浪涌（IEC 61000-4-5）和电快速瞬变脉冲群（IEC 61000-4-4）测试电压电平；设备须以老挝市场的230 V测试条件进行测试或评估；（2）老挝强制电磁兼容抗扰度标准状态——DOSM尚未公开确认发布专门针对无线/物联网设备且等同于CISPR 35或IEC 61000-4系列的强制MS标准；须在申请型号批准前向DOSM核实；（3）检测实验室认可——目前尚不清楚MICT/DOSM是否接受中国CNAS认可电磁兼容实验室的检测报告，或是否须在老挝认可或ACCSQ-MRA认可的实验室进行测试。制造商应就电磁兼容抗扰度可接受的检测证明向MICT/DOSM寻求预咨询。
gap.zht: 中國CCC/GB/T 17618電磁相容抗擾度檢測報告不被寮國MICT或DOSM自動認可。主要抗擾度差距為：（1）電網電壓——寮國為230 V，中國為220 V，這可能影響市電供電設備的浪湧（IEC 61000-4-5）和電快速瞬變脈衝群（IEC 61000-4-4）測試電壓電平；設備須以寮國市場的230 V測試條件進行測試或評估；（2）寮國強制電磁相容抗擾度標準狀態——DOSM尚未公開確認發布專門針對無線/物聯網設備且等同於CISPR 35或IEC 61000-4系列的強制MS標準；須在申請型號批准前向DOSM核實；（3）檢測實驗室認可——目前尚不清楚MICT/DOSM是否接受中國CNAS認可電磁相容實驗室的檢測報告，或是否須在寮國認可或ACCSQ-MRA認可的實驗室進行測試。製造商應就電磁相容抗擾度可接受的檢測證明向MICT/DOSM尋求預咨詢。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in principle — wireless/IoT devices must not cause interference to other devices and must operate acceptably under Lao grid conditions (230 V / 50 Hz); specific mandatory Lao EMC immunity standard (CISPR 35 / IEC 61000-4 series equivalent) and test laboratory acceptance policy are to be confirmed with DOSM and MICT
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 17618 immunity assessment mandatory for CCC-certified IT equipment (CNCA-C17-01, SAMR); GB/T 17626 series immunity tests required; test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories

source.publisher: Department of Standards and Metrology (DOSM), Ministry of Science and Technology, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC immunity compliance for wireless and IoT devices in Laos requires alignment with the 230 V / 50 Hz Lao grid (surge and EFT test levels differ from 220 V Chinese grid). Chinese CCC/GB/T 17618 immunity reports are not automatically accepted by MICT/DOSM. Whether DOSM has published a mandatory Lao EMC immunity standard equivalent to CISPR 35 or IEC 61000-4 series must be confirmed with DOSM before MICT type approval application. Manufacturers should seek pre-submission consultation with MICT to determine acceptable test evidence for EMC immunity. Verified: false — confirm current DOSM/MICT EMC immunity standard requirements before relying on this row.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 老挝无线及物联网设备的电磁兼容抗扰度合规须与老挝230 V / 50 Hz电网（浪涌和电快速瞬变脉冲群测试电平与中国220 V电网存在差异）对齐。中国CCC/GB/T 17618抗扰度报告不被MICT/DOSM自动接受。DOSM是否已发布等同于CISPR 35或IEC 61000-4系列的强制老挝电磁兼容抗扰度标准，须在申请MICT型号批准前向DOSM确认。制造商应在提交前向MICT寻求预咨询，以确定电磁兼容抗扰度的可接受检测证明。已核实：否——在依赖本行内容前，请确认DOSM/MICT当前电磁兼容抗扰度标准要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 寮國無線及物聯網設備的電磁相容抗擾度合規須與寮國230 V / 50 Hz電網（浪湧和電快速瞬變脈衝群測試電平與中國220 V電網存在差異）對齊。中國CCC/GB/T 17618抗擾度報告不被MICT/DOSM自動接受。DOSM是否已發布等同於CISPR 35或IEC 61000-4系列的強制寮國電磁相容抗擾度標準，須在申請MICT型號批准前向DOSM確認。製造商應在提交前向MICT尋求預咨詢，以確定電磁相容抗擾度的可接受檢測證明。已核實：否——在依賴本行內容前，請確認DOSM/MICT當前電磁相容抗擾度標準要求。
